query:
INSERT INTO orders (orderNumber, establishmentId, status, customerName, customerPhone, customerAddress, deliveryType, paymentMethod, subtotal, deliveryFee, discount, total, notes, source, createdAt, updatedAt, completedAt, changeAmount)
SELECT CONCAT('3', SUBSTRING(orderNumber, 2)), 30001, status, customerName, customerPhone, customerAddress, deliveryType, paymentMethod, subtotal, deliveryFee, discount, total, notes, source, createdAt, updatedAt, completedAt, changeAmount
FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE '9901%' AND establishmentId = 1
